failure_modes.failure_mode: Command sent to wrong zone controller
failure_modes.cause: Zone field corrupted in transit or mis-set by caller
failure_modes.detection: Zone mismatch check in every controller send()
failure_modes.mitigation: REQ-CTRL-003 zone validation + REQ-E2E-003 CRC integrity

failure_modes.effect: Incorrect actuation data applied to ECU
failure_modes.cause: Single or multi-bit error in payload bytes
failure_modes.mitigation: REQ-E2E-002 CRC covers both seq and payload bytes

failure_modes.failure_mode: Replayed command accepted after window eviction
failure_modes.cause: Sliding window too small or eviction not preceding acceptance check
failure_modes.mitigation: REQ-E2E-005 32-entry window with correct eviction order

failure_modes.failure_mode: CRITICAL command starved behind NORMAL backlog
failure_modes.effect: Safety-critical command delayed in emergency scenario
failure_modes.mitigation: Separate CRITICAL/HIGH/NORMAL queues with CRITICAL-first dispatch

failure_modes.effect: ECU failure goes undetected; vehicle subsystem silently fails
failure_modes.cause: Watchdog thread not running or miss counter not incrementing
failure_modes.detection: WatchdogMonitor polls at configured interval; unhealthy flag set after miss_window misses
failure_modes.mitigation: REQ-WDG-003 background poll thread + REQ-WDG-004 health flag

failure_modes.failure_mode: Unverified peer accepted as TLS bridge endpoint
failure_modes.effect: Man-in-the-middle can inject or observe commands
failure_modes.cause: REQUIRE_MUTUAL_AUTH check bypassed or constant changed to false
failure_modes.detection: TlsBridge::new() rejects unverified peers with NotConnected
failure_modes.mitigation: REQ-TLS-002 enforces peer_verified() at construction time

failure_modes.failure_mode: Exhausted bucket does not return Busy
failure_modes.effect: DoS allows unlimited commands to flood a controller
failure_modes.cause: Token bucket logic error; tokens underflow or not checked
failure_modes.mitigation: REQ-RL-006 Busy sentinel + REQ-RL-007 CRITICAL exempt from rate limit

failure_modes.failure_mode: Loaned buffer not returned to pool on drop
failure_modes.cause: Loan::drop() not implemented or release callback not called
failure_modes.detection: impl Drop for Loan calls release() callback
failure_modes.mitigation: REQ-LOAN-004 Drop impl + return_loan() both call release

failure_modes.failure_mode: Group command dispatched to members with wrong zone field
failure_modes.effect: Member controllers reject command with ZoneMismatch
failure_modes.cause: cmd.zone not rewritten to member zone before dispatch
failure_modes.detection: ZoneGroup::send() rewrites cmd.zone = m.zone() per member
failure_modes.mitigation: REQ-ZG-003 per-member zone rewrite before dispatch

failure_modes.effect: Invalid command or response processed by a controller
failure_modes.cause: Missing header validation, wrong magic bytes, or bad length
failure_modes.detection: validate_header() checks magic, version, and length
failure_modes.mitigation: REQ-WIRE-003 header validation + 30s fuzz smoke in CI
